sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Gam khat pan gam khat dongah;
Kei leh nang ading bawl ta;
A Tapa a hong pia hi;

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Gam khat pan gamkhat dongah (gam khat pan gamkhat dongah)
(lungdam thu), man ngen lo (man ngen lo),
Nangmah le kei ading hi (Nangmah le kei ading

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Lungdam na thu’n hong sam hi,
A hong sapna na nial kei in,
Lungsim khial a nei mi in;
A mawhnate a san hangin, Tuumul bang in ngo ding

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: Bang gimna a thuak ding hiam;
Na nunglam ki hei kik kei in, Hi kei leh na si ding ta.

sections.label: Verse 4
lines: Mun teng gam teng thawn khin ta;
Hon pa singlamteh tung sih na,
a’ ding Honpa hong suak,” Khris Topa Kumpipa hi.
